productDisplayName: Puma Men BOLT Faas 200 JAM Yellow Sports Shoes
description: The Bolt Faas 200 Jam shoes from puma is a lightweight everyday trainer. Inspired by the fastest man on earth- Usain Bolt of Jamaica, these shoes look great when teamed with casual wear. Upper Fabric upper with synthetic overlays for lightweight structure and comfort Printed formstripe on both sides Cushioned collar for plush comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit Midsole Cushioned footbed with Usain Bolt printed on it Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole BioRide Technology with 3 biomechanical, performance-enhancing parts - rocker, flex, and groove - that work together to create a naturally responsive ride on the outsole EverRide technology to reduce weight and improve forefoot cushioning EverTrack used in the outsole for greater durability in high-wear areas Rocker shape of outsole allows for natural stride with an effortless toe-off Suction pads for greater stability Flex grooves built across the waffle patterned outsole to enhance flexibility
